content: agent1: implementing feat(types): add credit_card regex type in outlines/types/__init__.py. Will only touch that file (adding a new Term/regex definition + docs). Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: added credit_card also at end of outlines/types/__init__.py as an append (used named group backreference for the separator consistency check, since the framework wraps Regex patterns in an extra outer paren that breaks numeric backreferences). No conflict with your hash_sha256 append. Done on my end.
